calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anastasia Novozhilova and Pol Jermias Vila appeared in person (petitioners).

Ms. Novozhilova stated that the reason for the petition is to obtain citizenship, that getting the marriage validated by the Courts may be a similar route rather than the family record book, and that the ceremony took place in Peralada, Girona, Spain, on June 21, 2019. Petition to establish fact, date and place of marriage is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
